violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. -Observed seal on walk in cooler behind counter is damaged.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Observed customer use microwave has dried food inside of it.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Observed cold hold unit needs sides and doors wiped down.
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
